content: [Critical] Fix circular import bot_scheduler ↔ loyalty_email ↔ news_repost (extract get_bot_config to shared repo)
[Critical] Fix `is` literal comparisons in vault.py / routers/* (ruff F632) — 0 real violations found
[Critical] Audit localStorage usage — swap admin auth token to sessionStorage + eager legacy cleanup at module load
[Important] Fix missing hook deps in NEW code (DeepStateIntro — useMemo→useCallback)
[Important] Refactor large functions (news_repost_tick + _send_one + loyalty_email._send_one) into helpers
[Nice-to-have] Wrap remaining console statement in TerminalPopup
Regression test all touched APIs + admin login flow with sessionStorage — 100% backend, 95% frontend, 1 LOW-priority cosmetic finding fixed
